articles.title: A New Dance Show Based on a TV Series
articles.summary: Russell T Davies, who made a TV show called It's A Sin, is working with the Pet Shop Boys to turn it into a dance production. The TV show was about gay men and their friends during the HIV and AIDS crisis in the 1980s and 1990s. The new stage show will be an immersive performance with dance and visuals. It will premiere in Manchester at Aviva Studios, but the exact date is not yet known. Davies and the Pet Shop Boys are excited to tell this important story in a new way. The show will use music and movement to share emotions and history with the audience.

articles.title: Ryan Gosling Makes a Funny Space Movie
articles.summary: Ryan Gosling is an actor who stars in a new space movie called Project Hail Mary. In this film, he plays a science teacher who wakes up on a spaceship and has to save the world from bad bacteria that eat the sun. Gosling likes to add humor to his movies because he thinks funny things happen even in serious situations. He worked with real scientists to make the science parts accurate. The movie is about people working together to solve big problems and shows what humans can do. It is based on a book by Andy Weir and is now in theaters.

articles.title: Labubu Dolls Get Their Own Movie
articles.summary: Labubu dolls are popular toys from China, and they are going to be in a new movie! The movie will be made by Pop Mart, the toy company, and Sony Pictures. It will mix real people with computer animation. Paul King, who directed Paddington and Wonka, will be the director. Labubu toys are sold in blind boxes, which means you don't know which one you get until you open it. Celebrities like Rihanna like them too. The movie was announced in Paris during a special event for Labubu's 10th birthday. The creator, Kasing Lung, will help make the film. Experts think the movie could help Pop Mart become more than just a toy company and make fans even happier.

articles.title: UK Government Gives More Money to BBC World Service
articles.summary: The UK government is giving more money to the BBC World Service, which is a news service that shares stories with people all over the world. They will add £33 million over three years, which is about 8% more than before. The foreign secretary, Yvette Cooper, says this helps because the World Service gives clear and true news where it is hard to find. The BBC is happy because this money lets them keep telling trusted stories and fight fake news. The World Service reaches over 300 million people each week, and many live in places where news is not free. The government pays about one-third of the cost, and the rest comes from TV licence fees. The BBC wants the government to pay for all of it again, like they did until 2014. This funding is important to help people get good news, especially in countries like Iran where the BBC is banned but many still listen.

articles.title: Toby Samuel's Big Tennis Dream
articles.summary: Toby Samuel is a 23-year-old tennis player from England who has worked hard to become a professional. In just one year, he moved from being ranked 1,405th in the world to 171st, which is a huge jump. He won seven singles titles in six months, making him feel like a real pro. Toby trains at Bath University and credits his success to staying healthy and practicing well. He missed part of 2024 due to an injury but recovered in 2025. Now, he wants to keep winning and play in Grand Slam tournaments, which are the biggest events in tennis. He is excited to share his journey with his family and supporters. His next goal is to play in the main draw of a Grand Slam singles event, something he has never done before.

articles.title: A Tennis Star Speaks Out About a Tournament
articles.summary: Aryna Sabalenka is a top tennis player who won big tournaments like the Australian Open. She recently decided not to play in a tournament in Dubai because she needed to rest and stay healthy. The tournament director criticized her for withdrawing, which made Sabalenka upset. She said the director cares more about money than the players' well-being. Sabalenka might not play in Dubai again. Other players, like Coco Gauff, support Sabalenka and think the calendar is too busy, causing injuries. Tennis players often talk about having too many games in a year. In other news, Katie Boulter won her match in Miami.
